description: Data filtered from a Hypertension Risk Dataset by Md Raihan Kahn. I was more interested in looking for health effects of smokers versus non-smokers here, but in the end I was the most surprised by the age groups of the heaviest smokers that were polled.

recordsets.recordset_description: Table of a few metrics of smokers cleaned and transformed in Excel and SQL from an existing hypertension risk dataset.
